You hit enemies when they're down, dazed, or otherwise incapacitated. Your survival depends on your willingness to do whatever it takes to win.

Dragons are gods. Dragons represent everything kobolds hope to become. Everyone fears them. If dragons are not true gods, they are close enough for you. Encounters with dragons awe you, far beyond the threat they pose. You feel conflicted about fighting dragons and seek a peaceful way out of such an encounter, such as by making an offering or spouting excessive flattery. Should your efforts fail, you still support your allies, but killing the dragon should be the last resort.

You know your place. Every kobold in a tribe knows that for the rest to survive, each member must do his or her duty. As an adventuring kobold, you see your companions as your new tribe and search for a way to contribute outside of combat. You might cook meals, mend clothing, or polish armor in addition to fulfilling your role during exploration and combat.

You exercise caution. Taking heedless risks can get you killed. Better to be prepared and know what you're getting yourself into. If you get in over your head, fleeing is an important tactic. An enemy that gives chase enters unfamiliar territory, often protected by traps. As a kobold, you feel no shame in running away and expect your companions to do the same should the situation turn against you.

The world hates you. Being considered vermin by most people you meet is bound to take a toll. No matter what you accomplish, others might be anything from suspicious to hostile. Even most other reptilian humanoids look down on you, though they're more likely to show you some respect if you prove yourself. When traveling through civilized lands, consider concealing your features to avoid conflicts.

狗头人特征: Ambitious, cooperative, fawning, greedy, loyal, obedient, quick, timid

男性姓名: Bont, Dartak, Deekin, Forgen, Kol, Meepo, Nin, Speelok, Zeem

女性姓名: Capax, Eenith, Foruul, Gumba, Iimen, Lorpe, Rowatak

部落名字: Black Death, Broken Fang, Gouger, Red Moon, Skull Kicker, Torn Ear

 

狗头人辅助威能

当你的狗头人角色在1级之后获得一个职业辅助威能时，你能选择一个相同或更低等级的狗头人辅助威能来取代该职业辅助威能。

快撤！ Flee!

A kobold knows better than to fight against overwhelming odds. Sometimes the only way to win a fight is to escape and fight another day. When it's time to retreat, a kobold leads the way to safety.

投石索装弹 Load Slingpot

Kobolds create special sling ammunition made of various substances stored in tiny clay pots. You have learned how to exercise this art through a bit of draconic magic. The magic is unpredictable, however, so you're never sure which enchantment you're going to get.

隧道疾走 Tunnel Scuttle

Living in the tight tunnels and unpredictable pathways of a dungeon taught you how to move quickly over precarious terrain. You can climb natural chimneys and fit through tiny spaces, and do it all quickly enough to get away from danger.

狂乱快步 Frantic Shift

Cold-blooded kobolds might not look like the quickest creatures, but they can spring about with surprising speed. They prize the ability to move safely and quickly.

陷阱共享法 Trap-Gang Method

When kobolds go searching in corridors they believe to be trapped, they work in teams. Working together increases the odds of survival, either because teammates can warn each other or because they can distribute the brunt of a triggered trap's effects. Most big folk don't go in for this sort of thing, so adventuring kobolds "recruit" enemies for the job.

Duergar.name: 灰矮人 Duergar
Duergar.description:
Average Height: 127m-142cm/4'2"-4'8"

Average Weight: 73kg-100kg/160-220 lb

Ability scores: +2，+2

Size:

Speed:

Vision:

Languages: 通用语，异怪语，矮人语

Skill Bonuses: +2地城

 

恐怖飞羽: 你具有@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.4Zor0wtNcKU78Ob1]{恐怖飞羽 Infernal Quills}威能。

Warforged.name: 机关人 Warforged
Warforged.description:
Average Height: 183cm-198cm/6'0"–6'6"

Average Weight: 122kg-136kg/270-300 lb

Ability scores: +2；+2

Size:

Speed:

Vision:

Languages: 通用语

Skill Bonuses: +2坚韧，+2威吓

 

为了已终结的战争而被创造，找寻着生存的意义所在。

活体构装: 你是一个活体构装体。你不需要进食，饮水，呼吸，和睡眠。你不需要进行坚韧检定来对抗饥饿，干渴和窒息。其他状态依然正常对你造成影响。 无眠哨兵: 你不需要睡眠，而只是进入一种持续4小时的静止状态以获得长休息的好处。在这个状态下，你可以充分注意到周围的情况，并且可以如常发现敌人接近或者其他事件。 机关人韧性: 你在对抗持续伤害的豁免骰上获得+2种族加值。同时，当你进行死亡豁免检定时，你可以使用你掷出的更好的结果或取10。 机关人意志: 你在意志上获得+1种族加值。 机关人决心: 你具有@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.YyZIwUxSO4lRdjcP]{机关人决心 Warforged Resolve}威能。

身为天生的士兵，机关人是拥有人类的智慧以及自我意识的人造物，象征着一个时代的终结。但机关人所发展出的知觉，却是由于他们创造者希望创造出一种能自行适应战场的完美战争机器所产生的副作用。当没有大规模战争的可以参与，也没有远古的遗物需要争夺，只剩下一些不到百年的文明遗迹时，机关人就成为了一支新独立的族群。在融入了由那些人数远比它们更多的种族所建立的社会之后，机关人以其坚韧和专注而闻名，工作起来和战斗同样出色。

扮演一名机关人，如果你希望…

* 强壮、结实、为战斗而生的角色。 * 搜寻你存在的意义 * 成为偏爱战士，野蛮人，守望者和圣武士的种族的一员

 

外貌特征 Physical Qualities

机关人是由钢铁及石头构成的笨重类人生物。在由类似材料制成的骨架，以及由皮革和木质纤维束制成的肌肉系统的支撑下，机关人体内有一套充满了血样液体的内置管路系统，维护和润滑着其它系统。他们有力的手臂末端是只有两根手指和一根拇指的的手，他们的脚上也只有两根宽大的脚趾。

机关人的头部拥有简单的人类特征，拥有阴沉的表情以及由铰链连接且没有牙齿的下顎。他们也没有鼻子。当经历剧烈的感情时，他们的眼睛有时会发光，同时他们的前额和头顶浮现出符纹的线条。每一个机关人的前额都有一个独特的符文，就像人类拥有独特的指纹一般。这个符文读作“Ghulra”，是在魔神语中表示“真理”的文字。

机关人拥有明显是人造而且无性别差异的外观。他们不能像其他的类人生物般繁殖自身。然而，它们的痛觉似乎仅限于受伤，这让它们可以很容易的改装自己的身体。这类身体改装也让机关人像其他种族般，拥有著各式各样的外表。

角色扮演机关人 Roleplaying a Warforged

Warforged have a straightforward emotional range. Although they experience pain, fear, hatred, and anger like other races, they are reserved and pensive, hiding emotions behind expressionless metal faces. Some warforged lack introspection and are dangerously naïve or emotionally stunted. Many warforged are the opposite, though. They question the purpose of their existence and consider whether or not they have souls. A few warforged develop sophisticated philosophies about what they perceive and learn. Many warforged fall in with humanoids of similar mindsets, working passionately for an organization or a religion. A warforged typically forms a strong emotional attachment to a small group of comrades.

A warforged often has limited experiences in the world, having spent its existence assigned to one specific duty. Warforged enjoy working, and many create endless lists of goals and chores. They take pride in their jobs, and they dislike idleness and failure more than most races do. A warforged's sensibilities give it a single-minded efficiency with any task, particularly in combat. War and military conditioning color warforged behavior. Warforged intuitively understand duty, conflict, the chain of command, and other elements of war and soldierly life.

Because most warforged have bodies that resemble males, they identify themselves as males and prefer to be called “he” rather than “it.” Some warforged adopt female names, though. Most warforged have simple names related to their jobs, abilities, or military positions. Warforged often accept the names or the nicknames that their comrades give them, although some search long for particular names that define them. Many simply take names common within another race, especially those of humans.

机关人特征: 好斗的、机警的、无畏的、好奇的、直率的、勤奋的、忠诚的、守序的、天真的、老练的、沉默的、纯朴的。

机关人姓名: Azm, Book, Bulwark, Cutter, Falchion, Graven, Hammer, Mark, Morg, Nameless, Pierce, Pious, Relic, Rune, Steeple, Three, Titan, Unsung, Victor, Watcher, Zealot

Githyanki.name: 吉斯洋基人 Githyanki
Githyanki.description:
Average Height: 183cm-196cm/6'0"-6'5"

Average Weight: 73kg-86kg/160-190 lb

Ability scores: +2，+2

Size:

Speed:

Vision:

Languages: 通用语，异怪语

Skill Bonuses: +2历史

 

危险感知: 你在先攻上获得+2加值 吉斯洋基的意志力: 你在意志上获得+1加值，且你在对抗魅惑效果的豁免检定上获得+2加值。 意念转移: 你具有@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.zSGK83J2PATZQbrf]{意念转移 Telekinetic Leap}威能。

作为奴隶出身的种族，吉斯洋基人是凶悍的心灵战士，他们定期在众星之海中往来，使用银剑作战。

吉斯洋基人和吉斯泽雷人曾经同是一个被灵吸怪奴役的种族——吉斯人，但是在他们争取来自由之后，他们分裂成了两个种族。吉斯泽雷人逃到元素混沌，逐渐成为了自省的修行者，而吉斯洋基人逃到了众星之海，逐渐成为了仇外的军国主义者。吉斯洋基人建立了根据地和军队，然后启程去征服挡在他们道路上的一切。

 

很久很久以前，原始的吉斯人从他们的灵吸怪统治者手下逃脱，然而却在激烈的内战下分化出吉斯洋基人和吉斯泽雷人这两个对手。随着时间流逝，吉斯洋基人建立了一种暴政，这种暴政制度的残忍嗜血程度几乎和曾经奴役他们的灵吸怪们一样。吉斯洋基人只要一见到灵吸怪就会发动攻击，另外，他们对待他们的亲戚吉斯泽雷人的态度也是一样。

吉斯洋基人说通用语。他们也从灵吸怪统治者那学会了异怪语

吉斯洋基人的城市和根据地都建立在众星之海中无名和荒废的死物上。吉斯洋基人在众星之海里使用星界飞船航行，寻找已死去的神祗和已毁坏的领域的残片来增强他们自己的要塞，丰富他们自己的储藏。偶尔，他们会把视线放到其他世界，下定决心去进行洗劫一空。

吉斯洋基人没有家庭，他们一出生就属于一些被称为“骨干”的军事训练机构。一个吉斯洋基人会异乎寻常地重视自己的“骨干”，另外一个特点是，他们从不会知道自己父母和兄弟姐妹的名字。对一个吉斯洋基人来说，比“骨干”更重要的是他自己的武器。吉斯洋基人甚至会重视自己的武器多过于重视自己的同伴。

图纳拉斯是最大的吉斯洋基城市，它建立在一个漂浮在众星之海的死亡神祗身上，被Vlaakith这位吉斯洋基人的巫妖女王所统治着，她已经统治了超过1000年了。吉斯洋基人把这位巫妖女王当作他们种族的母亲一样尊敬着。对他们来说，她的话就是真理。据说，她会把任何挑战她的政策和权威的人除掉，吞噬掉他们的生命元素。

吉斯洋基人和红龙有着契约，这在某些时候允许吉斯洋基人骑乘红龙。

Githzerai.name: 吉斯泽雷人 Githzerai
Githzerai.description:
Average Height: 183cm-196cm/6'-6'5"

Average Weight: 73kg-86kg/160-190 lb

Ability scores: +2；+2

Size:

Speed:

Vision:

Languages: 通用语，异怪语

Skill Bonuses: +2杂技，+2运动

 

苦行与戒律，为身心之主宰。

危险感知: 你在先攻检定上获得+2种族加值 防御意念: 你在对抗晕眩、被支配或震慑的效果的豁免骰上获得+2种族加值。 快步天运: 当你使用回气时，你能以一个自由动作快步3格 钢铁意志: 你具有@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.T6fK8DVE9Pchrs74]{钢铁意志 Iron Mind}威能

吉斯泽雷起源于一群被夺心魔所苛刻奴役的古老种族。直到一场流血起义才还他们以自由之身，而思想观念的不同又使他们分裂成两派：吉斯泽雷（Githzerai）和吉斯洋基（Githyanki）。吉斯泽雷摈弃了残忍好战的吉斯洋基，退回到元素混沌（the Elemental Chaos），在这凡界遥远的角落，走上了自省的道路，发掘着灵魂和身体的力量。几百年来，吉斯泽雷一直如此，过着自律的生活，观察着所处的境遇，以坚定自己在这个世界的位置。

扮演一个吉斯泽雷，如果你希望……

* 与位面有着紧密联系 * 能躲避攻击，在敌人前抢先一步 * 倾向于成为神罚使、武僧、游侠或者巡者

 

外貌特征 Physical Qualities

吉斯泽雷以清瘦的体型和奇异的外貌为特征，他们通常比人类要高，纤瘦得甚至有点憔悴。他们的皮肤色调偏黄，有时也会渐变至棕色或绿色。他们脸形棱角分明，长着尖耳，眼睛像是镶嵌在脸上一样，扁平的鼻子长得很靠上。

男性吉斯泽雷通常会削发，光头或者把头发辫起来，脸上的毛发也一样。普遍的发型是脑门剃光后面留着长辫子。女性的长发通常辫起或扎成圆发髻。吉斯泽雷的发色一般是红褐色，有时也有黑色或灰色。

吉斯泽雷信奉禁欲主义，这意味着他们个人轻蔑财富的显露。他们的服装设计上简洁实用，只用一些朴素的宝石装饰。他们遵从自己在体绘和纹身上的艺术天赋。这些图案甚至包含了一些功能：刺青是一种标识，能让吉斯泽雷之间辨认出其教派，以及来自何方。

吉斯泽雷人的寿命和人类差不多长

角色扮演吉斯泽雷人 Roleplaying a Githzerai

吉斯泽雷为自己的传统感到骄傲。这点通过他们的哲学体系、行为方式以及违逆吉斯洋基和夺心魔的行径可以显现。吉斯洋基渴望战斗和胜利，而吉斯泽雷则寻求内心的和谐和自律。他们经常长途跋涉以探求真我，以见证存在的诸多可能来摒弃凡尘杂念。

虽然吉斯泽雷乐于探求体验多元宇宙，但是他们也保有一般世界所应该有的个人责任感和使命感。一族的社会阶级完全由其价值决定，每个吉斯泽雷都要努力名留青史。那些因超凡技艺和文化贡献而名垂千古的大英雄、领导者、教育家中，都刻有吉斯泽雷的名字。而那些没有价值的人，则始终地位低下，然后被渐渐遗忘。

吉斯泽雷外表给人予苛刻、谨慎、实际、顽固的强烈印象。对不需要的东西他们不会过多奢求。他们话语简明而非长篇大论。即使吉斯泽雷暴烈的真性体现在好胜的决心和执着的忠诚上，他们也很少显露感情。吉斯泽雷的信任是要争取的，虽然大部分吉斯泽雷乐于看到别人弱小和缺乏自律的一面。吉斯泽雷倒对利用身边的资源欣然接受，包括和其它种族的成员一起克服困难，相互支持。只要有成功的可能，吉斯泽雷就不会在挑战面前退却。

没有什么人际关系真正能束缚吉斯泽雷。宗教、民族甚至家庭忠诚都不如个人探求和启示重要。吉斯泽雷认为实践出真理，患难见真情远为比传统观念和传述教条有价值得多。吉斯泽雷挑选出有能力的人作为导师、学生或伙伴，对于这些人，吉斯泽雷会是最坚定的盟友。

吉斯泽雷必须毫无偏见地看人待物，向他人学习，甚至冒一些风险才能判定一些事物是否有价值，然而更容易信任同族这一点让其对他族的耐心略有下降。只有少数异族人才能真正了解吉斯泽雷所经历的斗争。

吉斯泽雷人特征: 克已、深沉、冷静、谨慎、嫉俗、自律、内省、实际、安静、隐秘、猜疑、简洁

男性姓名: Dak, Durth, Ferzth, Greth, Hurm, Kalla, Murg, Nurm, Shrakk

女性姓名: Adaka, Adeya, Ella, Ezhelya, Immilzin, Izera, Uweya

Elf.name: 精灵 Elf
Elf.description:
Average Height: 162cm-183cm/5'4"-6'0"

Average Weight: 59kg-77kg/130-170 lb

Ability scores: +2；+2

Size:

Speed:

Vision:

Languages: 通用语，精灵语

Skill Bonuses: +2自然，+2侦查

 

无与伦比的弓箭手，狡猾的探险家，野生森林的保护者

精灵武器擅长: 你获得长弓和短弓的擅长 精界起源: 你的祖先是妖精荒野的原住民，因此在有关生物起源的效果上，你被视为妖精界生物。 团体警觉: 你让离你5格内的非精灵盟友在侦查检定上获得+1种族加值。 荒野步伐: 当你快步时，你无视困难地形 精灵之精准: 你具有@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.CtM7czvpqxefFNRD]{精灵之精准 Elven Accuracy}威能。

In ancient times, the elves lived within the wild magic and lush beauty of the Feywild, free of strife, hunger, and want. Passing their days with feasting and song, they studied mystic lore and crafted objects of beauty for the sheer joy of knowledge and creation.

As with all good things, the elves' prosperity came to an end. In those days, the gods Corellon, Sehanine, and Lolth lingered long among the fey people. Corellon taught his children the secrets of arcane magic. With the strength of that magic, he sustained their prosperity despite the ravages of the war between the gods and the primordials. Sehanine taught the fey folk to seek their own paths and pursue their dreams, nurturing fierce fires of passion and commitment in their hearts. And all the while, Lolth plotted and schemed in secret, teaching her followers among the elves to stop at nothing to achieve their goals, and nurturing their discontent even in the midst of their paradise home.

For reasons shrouded in myth and distant memory, Lolth turned against Sehanine and Corellon, leading her chosen ones in battle against the other fey folk. The great war that followed never spilled from the Feywild to other realms. Despite its limited scope, however, that great conflict marked the death of the last true mortal paradise. Never again would any realm match the splendor and peace of the Feywild of Corellon's children.

The raging war drove wedges between families and factions of elves even as they fought together against the rebellious drow. The elves who had always loved the wild forests of the mortal world (usually referred to as sylvan elves by their eladrin cousins) spent more and more time in those woods, returning less often to their homes in the Feywild. In the aftermath of the war, they saw that they could not depend on the gods for peace, justice, and security. They bore no ill will toward Corellon or Sehanine. Instead, they blamed themselves for allowing their dependence on their gods to blind them to the evil growing around them.

Making new homes in the natural world, the elves chose the deepest, most isolated forests. There, they ranged far and wide, seeking new vistas to explore. They encountered humans, dwarves, and halflings, trading with the folk they met and setting up alliances as warranted. Among humans especially, the elves gained a reputation as an enigmatic, mysterious race.

At the same time, invading orcs, conquest-minded human tribes, ravaging goblins, and restless undead pressed upon elven territory. With the coming of Nerath, countless elven tribes were absorbed into the human empire.

Today, in the wake of the fall of Nerath, elves can be found in most areas of the world. Many human settlements include at least a few elves, and some have entire elven communities within them. Other elven tribes continue to wander the wilderness, though they face increasingly violent raids by orcs, goblins, gnolls, and worse. Each year, the shadow spreading over the world closes tighter and tighter around elven territories, forcing the elves to seek alliances with the other humanoid races to survive.

 

外貌特征 Physical Qualities

精灵是纤细、灵活的种族，与人类的身高相似。他们的肤色也与人类相似，但是更趋向于褐色与棕色。典型的精灵发色是棕黑色、橘色、苔绿色或深金色。精灵的体毛很少，但是他们喜欢野性的打扮，头发常常披散着。

精灵到达成年的年纪与人类差不多，但是成年后岁月就很少在他们身上留下痕迹。精灵年龄增长的第一个信号是他们的发色的改变——颜色更趋近于褐色，变得更深或者带上更多如同秋天的颜色。大部分精灵可以活过200岁，直到生命的最后也保持着旺盛的精力。

态度和信仰 Attitudes and Beliefs

The elves retain the memories of the lost paradise they once enjoyed, and they seek to recreate it whenever they can. To an elf, life is too short to become dragged down in petty details, minor squabbles, and tiresome drudgery. Some members of other races see elves as flighty and impetuous. In truth, however, the elves have simply lost so much that they refuse to allow minor problems to perturb them. While dwarves or humans throw themselves into the problems and toil of each hour and day, an elf takes a long-term view that covers weeks and seasons instead. The unseen buildup to the war that sundered the elves from the eladrin took place over long decades, and the elves have learned to carefully watch the slow passage of years as a result.

Elves revere the natural world, and their connection to their surroundings inflects every part of their existence. They never cut living trees, and when they create permanent communities, they do so by carefully growing or weaving arbors, platform houses, and catwalks from living branches. Although they have an innate connection to the primal power of the natural world, they are equally adept with the arcane magic their eladrin cousins employ. Elves love to explore new forests and new lands, and it's not unusual for individuals or small bands to wander hundreds of miles from their usual territories.

For all their indulgence in earthly pleasures and their seemingly flighty ways, elves make deadly enemies. In the rise of evil, elves see the end of fellowship, laughter, and joy. Members of the evil races, particularly orcs, cannot understand how such “soft” creatures can strike with such terrible ferocity. Elves fight hard because they have learned to take joy in simple pleasures, and they understand the true cost of defeat as a result.

精灵团体 Elf Communities

Elf communities are an integral part of the forests in which they are found. Where humans might clear-cut a patch of woods, erect a stockade, and build houses, elves seek ways to meld their dwellings within the fabric of the living forest. They use magic and clever planning to guide the growth of trees, letting their branches serve as platforms for small huts high above the forest floor. Slender bridges of rope and wood connect these dwellings, and the elves pick out paths to the surface along the stoutest lower branches. Even an experienced ranger can walk beneath an elf village without realizing it.

Elves protect their homelands with a combination of stealth and ambush. They allow small bands of travelers to pass unhindered, preferring to remain unnoticed whenever possible. Only if traffic increases, or if outsiders make it clear that they intend to despoil the woods, do the elves take action. However, evil creatures such as orcs and goblins are typically attacked without provocation. Orcs tell tales of the Hungry Woods—forests where well-armed warrior bands disappear without a trace. Such tales often originate with the stealthy and brutal combat tactics of the elves.

Some elves live among humans, either by choice or as a result of the assimilation that occurred during the rise of Nerath. To them, humans too-often combine their passion and ambition with a singular lack of wisdom. However, elves are loyal to those who show loyalty, and they seek to better understand their short-lived friends.

角色扮演精灵 Roleplaying a Elf

When creating an elf adventurer, here are a few points to consider.

Protect all that is good and beautiful. The natural progression of the universe seems intent on destroying the fleeting grace of beauty, love, and peace. Thus, you must fight to ensure that these things survive. An elf might remain unmoved by the plight of a human city facing an orc invasion, even as an idyllic village of farmers in the horde's path spurs him to action. Elves appreciate beauty because their history has forced them to watch it gradually fade from the world. From the first days of the bitter fey war, through the rise and fall of a succession of worldly empires, the elves know all too well that anything worth enjoying or loving is worth fighting for.

Life is measured in years, not days. You are acutely aware of the unfurling of years and the grand tapestry of history. Elves plan for the long term, and you are no different. "Enjoy the day; prepare for the year," is a common elf saying that expresses this attitude. You might spend your days in song and drink easily enough, but all the while in the back of your mind, you watch a web of events unfold around you. You understand that an action now leads to a reaction—a change in the world—that might not become evident for years. When you adventure, you keep one eye on the future and your role in the grand scheme of events.

The strongest sword is guided with wisdom, not might. The best battles are those that are short, decisive, and as bloodless as possible. The elves are too few in number to wage wars of attrition, and they view risky tactics and frontal assaults as foolish at best. As an elf, you employ the most direct methods to defeat your enemy. Why waste time battling goblin patrols when the entire tribe will scatter with the death of its conquest-minded king? Keep the long-term view in mind, and settle all problems with quick, decisive resolution.

Tales and songs. The elves preserve their history through songs and tales told in the oral tradition. As a young elf, you would have heard and memorized these stories of great elf heroes, their legendary deeds, and the struggles of your people. You might draw on the nature, events, or themes of such stories for inspiration, or to express your elven point of view to your allies.

精灵特征: 灵巧，友好，敏锐，欢乐，洞察力强，快速，激动，野性

男性姓名: Adran, Aelar, Beiro, Carric, Erdan, Gennal, Heian, Lucan, Peren, Rolen, Theren, Varis

女性姓名: Adrie, Birel, Chaedi, Dara, Enna, Faral, Irann, Keyleth, Lia, Mialee, Shava, Thia, Valna

 

精灵辅助威能 "We claim no ownership of these lands, though we will defend them with every ounce of our blood."

Born from violence and betrayal, the elves, or wood elves, quit the Feywild to escape the horror and loss of their great war and start anew in the natural world. Leaving behind their kin and customs, some elves even set aside their religious obligations to Corellon and Sehanine. Though the Seldarine are honored still, many elves now put their faith in themselves and their accomplishments. Far from the Feywild, elves have grown into a distinct people.

Elves make their homes in wooded lands. Surrounded by bark and leaf, they live at peace with nature, cutting no tree and showing respect to the beasts whose lands they share. Elves develop talents to help them navigate their homelands, to protect themselves against the wicked humanoids that haunt their lands, and to hunt down those who wrong them.

You must be an elf to gain and use elf powers.

长距查看 Long View

Elves seldom act impulsively. With life spans measured in centuries, they approach situations with patience and insight to find the easiest path to any destination. Long view lets you single out an important enemy and strike with alarming accuracy.

不留踪迹 Leave No Trace

An elf grows up learning the ways of nature. Living in the wild instills in them a deep understanding of the relationship between predator and prey. One of the surest ways to become prey is by blundering through the wilderness without a care for the trail you leave. You've seen this and practiced the lessons of your people to hide your tracks.

确保精准 Determined Accuracy

Whether through supreme skill or uncanny luck, elves tend to hit what they aim at, especially when their need is greatest. Through many battles, you have honed your focus to a razor's edge. When you need to most, you can call upon that clarity to be absolutely certain you hit—unless all of fate is arrayed against you.

共享 Communion

Elves interact with loved ones on a level that outsiders rarely glimpse or understand. They possess the power to connect soul to soul, matching emotions and heartbeats. You have learned to share this sympathetic bond with an ally. Through a brief touch on the battlefield, you can give strength to a friend who has been beaten down, and in turn take courage from that ally’s recovery.

Dragonborn.name: 龙裔 Dragonborn
Dragonborn.description:
Average Height: 188cm-203cm/6'2"-6'8"

Average Weight: 100kg-145kg/220-320 lb

Ability scores: +2；+2

Size:

Speed:

Vision:

Languages: 通用语，龙语

Skill Bonuses: +2历史，+2威吓

 

骄傲而光荣的勇士，从远古龙神的血中所生。

龙裔之怒: 当你重伤时，你在攻击骰上获得+1种族加值 龙之传统: 你的回复力值等同于1/4你的最大生命值 + 你体质调整值 龙息: 你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.MW2qXnwLDplZxk3v]{龙息 Dragon Breath}威能 龙惧: 你可选择此种族特征来替代「龙息」。你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.C5hv68jqEOX4ewRn]{龙惧 Dragonfear}威能

Long ago, the dragonborn ruled over Arkhosia—a great and powerful empire that controlled vast stretches of the world. Spreading out from the cities at the core of the empire, the dragonborn built roads, settlements, and fortresses reaching to the edge of the frontier. Arkhosia was a golden age for the dragonborn, and a time of great prosperity and honor.

However, this prosperity would not last. Arkhosia fell into conflict with the tiefling empire of Bael Turath, and a long and bloody war took its toll on both sides. In time, the Arkhosian Empire fell as the foundations of dragonborn society were broken. The lords and common folk of the empire were scattered, and while Bael Turath likewise crumbled, the dragonborn could take no solace in that victory. Arkhosia faded into history, and the dragonborn were left as heirs to little more than memory and a sense of loss that still lingers.

The dragonborn of the present age carry on many of the traditions of ancient Arkhosia. All feel the weight of codes of honor that have been handed down for generations, and many dragonborn still possess relics of that bygone time. Arkhosian ruins dot the landscape, and the onceglorious empire remains at the forefront of many an ambitious dragonborn's mind. The blood of the warriors of lost Arkhosia beats in the hearts of modern dragonborn, many of whom believe that their empire will rise again.

 

外貌特征 Physical Qualities

龙裔像人形的龙。他们体表覆盖鳞片，没有尾巴。龙裔高大威猛，通常有6.5尺高，体重超过300磅。他们手脚粗壮，每只爪有一个拇指和三个指头。龙裔的脸上生有钝的喙，粗犷的眉，与众不同的脸颊和耳朵。眉毛上方是覆盖着长短不一的角状细小鳞片的冠顶，就像是厚重、粘腻的头发。眼睛是黯红或黯金色。

龙裔典型的鳞色是猩红、金色、铁锈色、赭黄、青铜色、棕色。很少有龙裔的鳞色调与彩色龙或金属龙一样，鳞的颜色也并不能显示龙裔喷吐的伤害类型。龙裔通体有精巧的鳞片，皮肤有皮革的质地；在前臂、小腿和足部、肩膀、大腿生有更大片的鳞。

年幼的龙裔比人类的幼儿生长更快。生下来就可以长途跋涉，3岁的龙裔相当于10岁人类孩子的体型和发育，15岁达到成年。龙裔的寿命与人类相当。

态度和信仰 Attitudes and Beliefs

To a dragonborn, honor is more important than life itself. First and foremost, honor is tied to battlefield conduct. Adversaries should be treated with courtesy and respect, even if they are bitter enemies. Caution and discretion are key to a warrior's survival, but fear is a disease and cowardice is a moral failing.

The drive to behave honorably extends into the rest of a dragonborn's life: Breaking an oath is the height of dishonor, and attention to honesty extends to every word. A commitment made must be carried out. Ultimately, a dragonborn takes responsibility for his or her actions and their consequences.

A continual drive for self-improvement reveals an additional aspect of dragonborn honor. Dragonborn value skill and excellence in all endeavors. They hate to fail, and they push themselves to extreme efforts before they give up on something. A dragonborn holds mastery of a particular skill as a lifetime goal. Members of other races who share the same commitment find it easy to earn the respect of a dragonborn.

Their draconic heritage gives the dragonborn a strong connection to Bahamut and Tiamat, the gods most closely associated with dragonkind. A rare few dragonborn offer fealty to both deities, but most believe that the two draconic gods represent a choice that every dragonborn must make, between Bahamut's path of justice and honor and Tiamat's hunger for greed and vengeance. Similarly, dragonborn often revere dragons, and they might ally themselves with such creatures should the opportunity present itself.

龙裔团体 Dragonborn Communities

At the height of the human empire of Nerath, the dragonborn were thoroughly assimilated into that empire and its culture. Today, many people think of dragonborn only as lone individuals or families living in the midst of mostly human communities. Such dragonborn often decorate their homes with small dragon carvings that echo the glorious statues of ancient Arkhosian cities.

A scattering of dragonborn communities can still be found in the former lands of the Arkhosian Empire. Where great cities once stood, clustered villages and towns have been built on the ruins of a lost civilization. Such communities often spring up around a single structure that dates back to the days of Arkhosia: A watchtower might become the new home of a village mayor, or the remains of a great amphitheater form the backdrop of a sprawling town marketplace. These dragonborn communities sometimes uncover ancient Arkhosian treasures, using the wealth produced by such finds to stay prosperous. However, many dragonborn refuse to dwell in the ruins of their former empire, angrily turning away from any reminder of Arkhosia's fall.

The Arkhosian Empire stretched far and wide, establishing numerous colonies along the fringes of what are now called the borderlands. Although most of these colonies fell into ruin or were abandoned when Arkhosia fell, others survived through a combination of their residents' determination and an isolation that kept them from the attention of central Nerath.

Having survived the fall of a second empire, these former colonial settlements stand as isolated beacons of civilization along the edge of the frontier. Likewise, the few surviving military outposts of Arkhosia have remained in dragonborn hands through countless generations. These now form the center of widespread (though still sparsely settled) dragonborn territories.

角色扮演龙裔 Roleplaying a Dragonborn

When creating a dragonborn character, here are a few points to consider.

Honor is everything. Your people value honor above life itself, but your sense of honor can manifest in different ways. Some dragonborn jump at the chance to prove their worth at even the slightest hint of an insult. Others instead let minor transgressions slide, knowing that those weak enough to commit them can do little to tarnish—or enhance—their reputations. Do you put your own life in danger for the sake of honor, giving a disarmed enemy his weapon back so that the fight will be fair? Or do you cut your enemies down without mercy, hoping to spare them from the lingering shame of defeat?

Seek victory and glory. The field of battle is where much of your honor is earned, and you seek out conflict wherever it can be found. However, gaining victory through small battles and minor skirmishes does little to enhance your reputation. Some dragonborn avoid the easiest fights even as they seek out ever more powerful foes. Others prefer to let the fight come to them, knowing that the greatest honor comes from responding to unwarranted aggression. You want to finish the fight in your favor, but whether you start it or let your enemy take the first swing determines the nature of the honor you earn.

You are the heir to Arkhosia. The dragonborn are the scions of a powerful empire, but memories and ruins are all that are left to you now. Your scattered people understand the importance of history, but that history means something different to each dragonborn. Some look forward to the day when Arkhosia rises again, making you and your kind the rulers of the world once more. Others believe that Arkhosia is a dream best forgotten, desiring to look to the future without carrying the weight of the past. Do you embrace the legends and traditions of empire that have been passed down through generations? Or do you seethe at every mention of fallen Arkhosia, knowing that your people will never again attain greatness until they learn to leave the past behind?

Take on the aspects of the dragon. Dragons are the greatest living embodiment of the magical power that courses through the world, and your draconic heritage is a constant reminder of that power. However, dragonborn embody the aspects of that heritage in different ways. Some fight with the ferocity and grace of a brash youngling, while others embody the great wyrm's sinister reputation as a cunning schemer and mastermind. Dragonborn often name their swords and armor for famous dragons, or give themselves a draconic moniker such as Fang of Bahamut or Burning Breath of Arkhosia.

龙裔特征: Driven, honor-bound, noble, perfectionist, proud, reliable, reserved, rooted in ancient history

男性姓名: Abraxus, Arjhan, Balasar, Bharash, Donaar, Ghesh, Heskan, Kriv, Medrash, Nadarr, Patrin, Rhasgar, Roghar, Shamash, Shedinn, Torinn

女性姓名: Akra, Biri, Daar, Harann, Kava, Korinn, Mishann, Nala, Perra, Raiann, Sora, Surina, Thava

 

龙裔种族威能 "Though Arkhosia may have fallen, its memory lives on in me."

The dragonborn are inspired by the legend of how they rose from droplets spilled from Io's body when the ancient dragon-god was slain by the axe of the rapacious Erek-Hus. The story inspires them to be honorable in their dealings, to work hard to perfect their skills, and to live up to the example set by their divine sire. Dragonborn utility powers demonstrate several ways in which these noble humanoids awaken the power within and harness it to aid them in their struggles.

Now with their empire in ruins, their cities and edifices turned to rubble, personal honor is the only thing the dragonborn have left. They conduct themselves in a fair and noble way in all that they do, whether fighting a duel on the battlefield or negotiating service with a potential employer. In this way, they keep Arkhosia alive.

You must be a dragonborn to gain and use dragonborn powers.

恶意之瞥 Baleful Glance

The ability of great dragons to cause dread just by their presence is legendary, but they don't need supernatural powers to inspire fear. A simple look from a dragon can freeze a soul in terror. It is the fright inspired by a predator's stare—the fear a rabbit feels when held not by the fox's jaws but its golden eyes. You have studied the ways of dragons and practiced something of this charismatic power. Now you can use your dragonfear to hold a foe within your gaze.

龙之冲袭 Dragon's Dive

When dragons take wing, they are masters of the sky. The greatest of the flying beasts—including wyverns, manticores, griffons, and rocs—hasten away when a dragon's silhouette darkens the clouds. Supreme aerial fighters, dragons often attack from on high, diving through storms of hail or flashing lightning to strike at prey or foes. Although you can't fly, you've taken this tactic to heart, learning to treat the melee around you as the storm and letting it wash off your back as you advance toward your enemy.

阿克霍西亚抵抗 Arkhosian Resilience

Dragonborn and dragons fought side by side against their tiefling enemies. The dragonborn learned to protect themselves against their partners' breath weapons so they could keep fighting even as destructive energy washed around them.

胜利咆哮 Triumphant Roar

Your draconic heritage is as obvious as the scales on your face, but that doesn't mean you can't shout it out. When you strike a decisive blow in battle, your voice reveals your pride and echoes the terrifying roars of the greatest dragons.

Shardmind.name: 魔晶人 Shardmind
Shardmind.description:
Average Height: 175cm-188cm/5'9"-6'2"

Average Weight: 82kg-104kg/180–230 lb

Ability scores: +2；+2

Size:

Speed:

Vision:

Languages: 通用语，异怪语，另外任选一种

Skill Bonuses: +2神秘，+2坚韧，+2到另外一个技能

 

闪闪发光的晶石身体中，蕴含着天然的灵能。

心灵感应: 你可以与任何离你5格内的拥有语言的生物进行心灵感应交流。 魔晶意志: 你获得5点心灵抗力。此抗力11级时为10，21级时为15。 活体构装: 你是一个活体构装体。你不需要吃，喝，呼吸和睡觉。你不需要进行坚韧检定来对抗饥饿，干渴和窒息。 星界起源: 你来自于众星之海，因此在有关生物起源的效果上，你被视为星界生物。 魔晶集群: 你具有@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.admYIuBThQZ8pPMD]{魔晶集群 Shard Swarm}威能

存活之门曾位于众星之海的顶点，而魔晶人则是存活之门的有意识的碎片。在这道门后，遥远国度正虎视眈眈；黎明之战中这道门的毁灭也造就了夺心魔帝国的崛起。即使艾欧恩关闭了这个入口，魔晶人依旧致力于重建存活之门，并永久切断遥远国度影响自然世界的能力。

扮演一名魔晶人，如果你希望：

* 成为一名奇异的、智力发达的、具有强大灵能的冒险者。 * 身怀一段久远的历史，一段与遥远国度和他的臣民为敌的历史。 * 成为一名偏爱职业为心灵术士、法师和神导士的种族的一员。

 

外貌特征 Physical Qualities

魔晶人是由千百个半透明的各色水晶碎片组成人形的水晶生物，具有纯净的灵能。魔晶人模仿人类的形态；一些魔晶人看上去更像男性，另一些则像女性。魔晶人在人类眼部的位置会发出亮光，而身体会发出朦胧的光；魔晶人也能瞬间停止发光——比如说，为了躲在暗处。

组成魔晶人身体的水晶碎片在持续不断地流动，就像血液循环一样。当魔晶人震慑或失去意识时，可能无法维持人类形态，一些碎片会飞离并环绕魔晶人，直到魔晶人恢复意识。

魔晶人勉强算得上活着的生物。他们的水晶身体不需要食物，他们不呼吸。他们不需要睡觉，尽管他们仍需休息6小时以获得一次长休息的效果。他们没有性别，且无法繁殖，但现存的魔晶人并不是黎明之战的那些个。魔晶人认为存活之门粉碎，化为了无数的碎片，当一个存在意识的水晶碎片被杀死，无尽宇宙中的另一个则开始感知。

角色扮演魔晶人 Roleplaying a Shardmind

魔晶人是存活之门的碎片，他们逻辑化地、单纯地看待整个世界，情感淡漠。一些魔晶人对生命有天真无邪的好奇，渴望经历人生、拥抱世界；另一些则矜持而冷淡。尽管他们看上去古井无波，当一种强烈的感情触动他们时，他们会强烈地表现出来。比如说，魔晶人不会气恼，他们会变得暴怒。

尽管全种族都有一个共同的目标：重建存活之门，一些学派对如何重建抱有分歧。这三个最重要的学派是思想铸造者、魔晶人至上和屠杀魔晶人。阅读下文“魔晶人冒险者”以了解各个学派。

魔晶人特征: 超然脱俗、深邃洞悉、足智多谋、逻辑清晰、深思熟虑

魔晶人的名字: Amata, Arshaka, AnNia, Balashi, Bashanu, Belessunu, Dipana, Erishti, Eshunu, Hunzu, Iltani, Ishmea, Kuaya, Kubaba, Kuri, Manishtu, Naram, Nuraya, Seluku, Tabni, Ubashu, Utua, Zakiti

Mul.name: 穆尔人 Mul
Mul.description:
Average Height: 173cm-193cm/5'8"–6'4"

Average Weight: 91kg-136kg/200-300 lb

Ability scores: +2；+2

Size:

Speed:

Vision:

Languages: 通用语，矮人语

Skill Bonuses: +2坚韧，+2市井

 

不屈不倦之人，只为战斗而生。

混血种族: 选择人类或矮人。你可以选择那些将你的选择作为前提的专长（当然还有那些限定穆尔人的专长），只要你满足任何其他的要求。 穆尔人活力: 你的回复力次数增加1。 不倦战士: 你在72个小时（而不是24小时）内需要休息6个小时来获得长休息的增益。 惊人韧性: 你具有@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.Z1TRC4pmvyrb2Xe8]{惊人韧性 Incredible Toughness}威能

穆尔人是人类与矮人结合的产物。他们拥有人类的身高、敏捷和思维变通能力，同时又遗传了矮人的身体素质和耐力——两个种族优点的结合使得穆尔人成为了一个不同寻常的混血种族。

穆尔人强壮，敏捷，耐力惊人，因此他们可以在奴隶市场上卖到非常高的价格，事实上，大部分的穆尔人都是作为奴隶出生的。

扮演一名穆尔人，如果你希望…

* 成为一个极为强壮的斗士。 * 扮演一个为自己的自由而战的奴隶英雄。 * 成为偏好战士、野蛮人和战魂的种族中的一员。

 

外貌特征 Physical Qualities

健壮的穆尔人看起来就像是一个特别强壮的人类。有些人可能会以为穆尔人的身高会介于人类和矮人之间，但实际上穆尔人的个头比大多数的人类还要高。男性穆尔人的肩膀宽大，而腰部却相对显得比较细；他们的大腿非常有力，手臂也相当粗大。女性穆尔人相对而言没有男性那么粗壮，但她们仍然是高大，强壮，以及灵活的武士。不管是男还是女，大部分的穆尔人都是光头，不过也有少数穆尔人的头顶长出了一点黑发。他们的脸部很难不让人想起矮人的脸：强硬，严厉，以及一对小耳朵。穆尔人的肤色和眼珠颜色也和人类一样是不固定的，但大部分穆尔人的肤色都是古铜色，还有少数穆尔人的眼珠是金色甚至是绿色的。

穆尔人个体之间并没有太多的相同点，他们的穿着习惯也是因人而定。不过穆尔人热爱纹身，他们更喜欢简单的几何图形而非动物或物体的形象。

穆尔人的生命周期与人类基本相同。

角色扮演穆尔人 Roleplaying a Mul

大部分的穆尔人刚出生时都是奴隶。提尔地区的奴隶主知道，人类和矮人的结合创造出的是惊人的顽强与耐力。穆尔人是出色的角斗士、奴隶战士和劳工，并且可以承担能够将其他种族活活累死的重活。

如果一个穆尔人获得了自由，以后就再也没有什么事情能束缚住他了。有些穆尔人逃进荒野中，成为肆虐荒原的强盗或是加入由其他逃脱奴隶组成的部落；另一些选择成为佣兵，靠出卖他们的战斗技巧维生。不愿反抗主人的穆尔人也许可以靠竞技场格斗或是为主人完成一项非常危险的任务来换取自由。少数身价高昂的角斗士拥有大量的特权，他们几乎已经是自由人了。DM也许会想让穆尔人角色以奴隶的身份开始游戏；如果不是这样的话，那么可以认为你的穆尔人角色在游戏开始时已经获得了自由。

强硬、受迫、务实，穆尔人的心中没有位置可以留给同情和怜悯。许多穆尔人是在皮鞭的抽打下长大的；他们在很小的时候就离开了父母身边，紧接着就要接受残酷的竞技场式训练。地狱训练的后果是，穆尔人在很长一段时间内都不会信任任何人，更不用提和他们成为朋友了。有些穆尔人的身上满是过去训练时留下的伤痕，后来就变得厌世且憎恨他人。其他的穆尔人则是贪婪、多疑的佣兵，过去的经历让他们学会了一件事——永远不在无利可图的情况下帮助其他任何人。不过，尽管他们通常表现得冷漠和自私，穆尔人依然可以学会与他人合作。在奴隶坑里长大的经历教会了他们如何与他人联手或是理解他人——作为社会最底层的人，他们能够活到今天就已经证明了这一点。

穆尔人特征: 易怒，生硬，冷漠，受迫，暴躁，诚实，多疑，苛刻，自制，顽固

男性姓名: Aram, Borthomar, Bost, Darok, Darus, Durn, Eben, Erekard, Gard, Harask, Marok, Morg, Rikard, Rikus, Sanozar, Uskan, Zedath, Zorus

女性姓名: Aisa, Aivel, Brithis, Callia, Demosis, Elina, Faivel, Himithis, Laivi, Narisel, Niva, Raina, Reshel, Saditha, Tirshel, Uisel, Zerima

Minotaur.name: 牛头人 Minotaur
Minotaur.description:
Average Height: 216cm-226cm/7'1"–7'5"

Average Weight: 145kg-159kg/320–350 lb

Ability scores: +2；+2

Size:

Speed:

Vision:

Languages: 通用语，另外任选一种

Skill Bonuses: +2自然，+2侦查

 

在野性与文明之间徘徊，这些斗士与内心的狂野斗争。

活力: 你获得一个额外的回复力。 凶猛: 当你的生命值降到0或更低时，你能以一个即时中断进行一次近战基本攻击。 鲁莽冲锋: 你在对抗冲锋中引发的借机攻击的AC上获得+2种族加值 抵撞冲锋: 你具有@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.lyITOGSmHJB4idZ2]{抵撞冲锋 Goring Charge}威能

牛头人是野性和文明，理性与疯狂的斗争的活的体现，因为他们内心有两重世界。被暴力驱使却又被良知束缚，许多牛头人致力于克服他们邪恶的冲动。这样的牛头人在野性与高雅之间寻找平衡。另一方面，无数牛头人屈服于不断污染他们灵魂的诱惑，成为了角之王巴菲门特（Baphomet, the Horned King）的奴仆。牛头人必须不断与自己的内心抗争，以免成为表里如一的野兽，否则就会深陷于他们所鄙视的邪恶兽性中不能自拔。

扮演一名牛头人，如果你希望…

* 成为一名拥有惊人力量和耐力的强大战士。 * 成为一名拥有怪物外形的，在自己的邪恶天性中挣扎的冒险者。 * 成为一个偏爱职业为野蛮人，战士和守望者的种族的一员。

 

外貌特征 Physical Qualities

牛头人的外貌混合了人类和公牛的特征，既拥有笨重而有力的类人身形，也长着向上弯曲的双角，牛的尾巴，以及和其他种族最不同的——公牛的头。毛发覆盖了牛头人的上半身，头部和颈部的毛发粗糙而厚重，肩部稍薄，而臂部和躯干上部的毛发则和人类的毛发差不多。毛发在腰部再次变厚，覆盖了阴部和腿部,并在尾部末端和蹄部围成一簇。牛头人以自己的角为荣，角的大小，颜色和锋利程度往往说明了一名牛头人在其社会中的地位。虽然大部分牛头人的毛发是红色或棕色，实际上他们的毛发包括了从苍白到漆黑的所有颜色。

迷宫图案对牛头人来说十分重要，在他们的衣服，铠甲，武器乃至皮肤上都可以发现这种图案。每一个氏族的迷宫图案都是特殊的，其大小和复杂程度代表了氏族的地位和归属。图案随着氏族的发展而变化，并因氏族成员的贡献而更加尊贵。

牛头人的寿命和人类一样长。

角色扮演牛头人 Roleplaying a Minotaur

牛头人对迷宫图案的喜爱是一种传统，而远非怪癖。它反映了牛头人的信仰以及他们对世界的看法。它是牛头人与内心好斗天性斗争的心路历程的具体表现。

每个牛头人都必须在自我中小心摸索以克服野性的冲动。有的牛头人可能很轻易就做到了这一点，有的则可能沉溺于幻觉与兽欲之中，终其一生也未能窥其门径。那些失败的牛头人可能会堕落为角之王的邪恶奴仆，给每一个牛头人社群带来阴影。

可能正是因为这种内心的挣扎，牛头人对他们做的任何事都能深入地研究。他们以磨练自己的技艺为乐，往往倾其一生钻研商业，艺术，魔法，或是战技。牛头人对自己选择的任务总是从一而终。牛头人并不认为失败是一种个人缺陷，反而视之为进步的机会。相反，在挑战面前退缩则被认为是软弱的表现。对牛头人来说，最大的挑战是时刻警惕自己内心的堕落，因此“放弃努力”有着比看上去更大的危险：它是迈向堕落的第一步。

尽管许多牛头人是文明生物，其他种族依然对他们抱有怀疑和敌意。这种敌意不仅仅来源于牛头人怪物般的外表，也来源于他们糟糕的名声。邪恶的牛头人是无情的劫掠者和杀手，可惜的是，外人对牛头人的了解往往只有他们而已。

牛头人特征: 嗜血，残忍，自律，开明，沮丧，好斗，神秘，有礼，野蛮，精神的，受折磨的

男性姓名: Asteron, Bjorkus, Codrus, Foostus. Goeban, Jak, Minron, Noostoron, Podrus, Terios

女性姓名: Duula, Esteru, Hester, Kuonu, Loodra, Oestra, Raastred, Seestra, Uovana, Weoren

Pixie.name: 皮克精 Pixie
Pixie.description:
Average Height: 15cm-30cm/0'6"-1'

Average Weight: 0.5kg-1.8kg/1-4 lb

Ability scores: +2；+2

Size:

Speed: ，飞行6格（高度限制1）。如果你的载重超过普通负重，则你不能使用此飞行速度

Vision:

Languages: 通用语，精灵语

Skill Bonuses: +2自然，+2隐秘

 

民间的魔法妖精，孩子般的恶作剧者，自然的魔法管理员。

精界起源: 你的祖先是妖精荒野的原住民，因此在有关生物起源的效果上，你被视为妖精界生物。 动物交谈: 你能和自然界野兽和妖精界野兽交谈沟通。 小巧战士: 你具有触及1，而不是超小型生物通常的触及0。你同时在破坏或强行打开物体的力量检定上受到-5减值。当持用和你的体型相同的武器时，你遵循和小型生物同样的规则。 皮克精魔法: 你具有@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.9SKMZoDn2GvBiRpx]{皮克精之尘 Pixie Dust}和@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.SygGk1Nmtsu879Cv]{缩小术 Shrink}两项威能。

An enchanted race born of raw fey magic, pixies are the diminutive fairy folk of the Feywild. Under the direction of the Court of Stars, they etch the patterns of frost on the winter ponds and rouse the buds in springtime. They cause flowers to grow and sparkle with summer dew, and they color the leaves with the blazing hues of autumn. Some believe that the pixies stole the secret of honey from the mead goblet of the Summer Queen, then sold it to the bees. It is said that they taught the birds to fly and to sing. These childlike sprites have a penchant for mischievous fun, and there is no game a pixie will not play, no sport it will not attempt, and no revelry it will avoid or decline.

Once upon a time in the green-gold of the dawning world, the Summer Queen gave birth to a beautiful child. No one knew which of the archfey was the child's father, and the Summer Queen refused to say. Powerful archfey of the Court of Stars gathered around her so that each in turn might bestow his gift on the new fey royalty, for each believed the child was his own.

The first gift came from the child's mother— the gift of whimsy, so that like the warm winds of summer, she might roam wherever she pleased.

"But whimsy needs a course and a direction, lest it give way to the destruction of storms," said the Sea Lord, who believed the child was his own. "As young rivers play upon the land before maturing into the great wide sea, so shall the child play." And he bestowed the gift of play on the fey child.

Then Oran the Green Lord, who also believed the child was his own, said, "Like the frivolous waters, play can overreach its bounds and wreck the labor of others. So I give this child the gift of care. As young seeds are nurtured in the earth that bounds the rivers and the seas, so shall the child care for all things green and alive."

The Prince of Frost, who knew the child to be his sister, only laughed at the other archfey. "By her silence does the Summer Queen have us doing her bidding for the sake of a child whose provenance we will never know," he said. "And so laughter is my gift to the child. Laughter is the north wind's breath that elevates the spirit in the face of those that would channel, bind, or control it."

So the child was blessed with the four gifts the Court of Stars had bestowed upon her—whimsy, play, care, and laughter. But after the others had departed, the child's true father secretly appeared beside her gossamer cradle. And then, Corellon, lord of arcane magic, blessed his daughter with the gift of wonder that is the purest form of magic, so that she and all her descendants should ever retain their childlike spirits.

Legends of the mortal realm say that because the Feywild is the bright reflection of the world, pixies are a reflection of humanity. As the bards tell it, whenever a human child is born, a pixie also comes into existence. The personalities of the two races are indistinguishable during the first few years of life. However, human adolescents cast off their childhood ways, while pixies retain them forever. Sometimes pixies feel compassion for mortals who retain a degree of childhood innocence. They often watch over such humans, secretly aiding their "flawed" reflections with magic when they fall on ill circumstances.

In the world, pixies were once as prevalent as they were in the Feywild. However, during the years that mortals have ruled, they have diminished and gone into decline. As humanoid civilizations began to flourish, they encroached on the pixies' homelands, pushing the fairy folk back into the Feywild and into the dark unknown beyond civilization.

特殊规则

作为一个皮克精，记住以下规则。

共享空间: 因为你是超小型，所以你能进入一个小型或更大的生物的空间，且能在那结束你的回合（被迫移动必须仍然停在一个未被占据的格子，除非另有说明）。如果两个生物在同一个格子内，则认为两者邻近。

高度限制: 如果你使用你的种族飞行速度且离地面超过了1格，则在你的回合结束时你坠落（参见万律书的飞行和坠落规则）。

武器: 因为你遵循和小型生物同样的武器规则，所以你不能使用双手武器，除非它具有小型特性。当你使用多用特性的武器时，你必须双手持用它，但不会因此而在伤害骰上获得通常的+1加值。

 

外貌特征 Physical Qualities

Barely over a foot tall, pixies resemble diminutive eladrin with gossamer wings. These wings sprout from their backs like those of dragonflies or butterflies, but are grander and more beautiful than either. Pixie wings come in as many colors as there are shapes to dreams. Despite their almost insubstantial quality, they are as bright as the clear dawn and as luminous as the full moonrise.

Pixies rarely appear to onlookers unless they wish to be seen, and other people who happen to spot a pixie are astonished at the first sight of these tiny fey. When pixies fly, a shower of sparkling dust follows in their wake like the glittering tail of a shooting star. Pixie dust is said to be composed of the dreams of the living forest, the gold of the brightest sunbeams, and the starlight cast upon lovers. When such elements are combined as one, they elevate the soul and grant the ability to fly.

Pixies' eyes come in as many different colors as their wings. When pixies interact with mortals in the world, their eyes appear to have pupils. However, the natural state of a pixie's eye is a single glittering orb like that of an eladrin.

Pixies wear light, ephemeral clothing that grants maneuverability while they fly. Noble pixies array themselves like princes and princesses of the fey, wearing flowing gowns and doublets of spider and caterpillar silk that sparkle like moonlight on a pond. Wild pixies dress themselves in acorns, leaves and bark, and the pelts of woodland beasts. Pixies prefer armor made of acorns, insect chitin, leather, the scales of reptiles, stiff bark, or fine mithral mail. They rarely wear heavy armor.

Pixies live as long as eladrin. In the Feywild, the race measures time in centuries, and pixies are effectively immortal unless they are slain. However, legends claim that some pixies are so bound to their human reflections in the world that they perish when that human dies.

态度和信仰 Attitudes and Beliefs

According to the oldest tales of the mortal races, pixies are as enchanting as the heart's true desire and as dangerous as the kiss of fate. Possessed of simple desires, pixies frolic in the sunlight, sing in the rain, and dance beneath the moon and stars. Eternally childlike, they find their joy in new games and new experiences, and boredom is their constant adversary.

Pixies thrive on randomness and excitement. The banal, common, and everyday routine of ordered life that mortal humanoids must endure is anathema to the long-lived pixies. Their restlessness gives rise to the kinds of tricks and pranks for which pixies are best known. When pixies enchant mortals to fall in love with ugly beasts or with their most hated enemies, they do so not only for their own amusement. Such magic is a gift that allows a bewitched mortal to break the ordinary routine of his or her life.

Despite their love of chaos, pixies obediently serve the Court of Stars and obey the commands of its leaders. They divide themselves into orders that revere their own rulers. Some serve the Summer Queen, others the Prince of Frost. In the world and in deep pockets of the Feywild, wild pixies can be found who serve no master. These dangerous fey view the members of other races as intruders in their realms, and are known to torture and slay them for sport.

Even the benevolent pixies who serve the Court of Stars can be dangerous. Mortals who wander into a fairy ring during a pixie dance can cross over into the Feywild without warning, becoming trapped there for years.

Like other fey, pixies rarely perceive short-lived humanoids such as humans as equals, living as they do only in the moment. Nevertheless, they believe that even the clumsiest mortals have the potential to experience the freedom and wonder that all pixies know.

皮克精团体 Pixie Communities

In the world, pixies make their homes in deep forests or hidden grottos beneath the hills, far beyond the sight of other humanoids. In these places, pixies cast their shimmering lights to color their domains in incandescent hues, gradually shifting from soft red to bright yellow to deep violet and back again.

Some say that the realms of the pixies are the places where rainbows begin and end, and those rainbows are pixie roads emanating from the light of the kingdoms they connect, which can be seen by mortals only when the sun shines through the rain.

Though pixies prefer to keep out of sight, they can be found almost anywhere in the Feywild. As intrinsically magical as they are whimsical, pixies enhance the world around them with their presence. At the beginning of time, the Court of Stars passed down decrees on each type of pixie, charging it with duties to uphold in the Feywild. Some pixies brush the flower petals with morning dew, while others are responsible for conjuring the evening mists. Some are charged with awakening the winking stars in the night sky, while others paint each sunset into a masterpiece of vivid colors.

Such labors keep pixies focused on putting their magic to benevolent uses, rather than becoming a source of pure mischief. Pixies in the world carry these traditions over with them. A creature that strays near a pixie home finds the world more alive somehow, thrumming with life, color, and breathtaking natural beauty.

Pixie settlements vary as widely as the shifting spectrum of color found in them. Isolated pixies build their homes among the roots of great trees in settlements similar to those of the gnomes. Larger pixie settlements resemble kingdoms in miniature, expanding to fill underground caverns or the insides of entire hills. Wild pixies live high up in the trees, where they tame birds and arboreal mammals for war and labor.

Pixie communities are ruled by nobility, usually a hereditary king, queen, prince, or princess whose ancestor was granted this title by the Court of Stars in the distant past. Pixie monarchs are at once wise, graceful, fierce, and powerful—a wonder to behold. Although pixie rulers enjoy mischief and play as much as any other member of their race, the responsibility given them by the Court of Stars keeps such behavior in check.

角色扮演皮克精 Roleplaying a Pixie

When creating a pixie adventurer, here are a few points to consider.

A childlike perspective. Pixies experience the world much as children do. They focus on the present, concerning themselves little with the past or the future. This is not to say that a pixie is not deeply saddened by the passing of a close companion, or that pixies are incapable of real emotion. Pixies simply don't dwell long on such matters, instead committing fully to the present moment and the experiences it has to offer. You give your full attention and interest to the task at hand, but cannot be bothered to reflect on the events of yesterday or tomorrow. For this reason, some creatures view you as flighty and capricious, even as others see you as a wise mystic, free from attachment and constantly living to your fullest potential.

Possessive of things, protective of friends. Though they abhor typical civilization, pixies have a strong sense of ownership. You do not keep many possessions, but those you do carry—a bird skull helmet, a bat wing cloak, a fine ribbon, a silver bell—are your treasures. No pixie will tolerate another creature handling such possessions without permission. By the same token, pixies see their friends as possessions. Anyone who threatens to harm your companions rouses your ire and will likely suffer for it.

Braver, bolder, and fiercer than you appear. Though pixies are tiny in stature, they exhibit a bravery that surpasses their size. When pixies take to arms, they fight with a singular ferocity. In their mail of shining leather, scales, or insect shells, they resemble miniature versions of the eladrin stalwarts of old.

皮克精特征: Brave, charming, childlike, energetic, fierce, magical, mischievous, outgoing, playful, possessive, stealthy, vigilant

男性姓名: Acorn, Barleycorn, Briarthorn, Buckthorn, Dogwood, Hawthorn, Hayseed, Hazelwood, Hoarfrost, Juniper, Maplesap, Mistlethrush, Nettle, Pinecone, Sparrowhawk, Thistledown

女性姓名: Appleblossom, Bluebell, Cobweb, Cottonwood, Dewdrop, Heartsease, Holly, Hyacinth, Ivy, Larksong, Lilyflower, Mistletoe, Moth, Mustardseed, Peasblossom, Willowbough

 

皮克精辅助威能

当你的皮克精角色在1级之后获得一个职业辅助威能时，你能选择一个相同或更低等级的皮克精辅助威能来取代该职业辅助威能。

腹语恶作剧 Ventriloquist Prank

Pixies delight in causing mischief by creating disembodied voices to startle gullible mortals. With their ability to communicate with all manner of birds and beasts, pixies can mimic a staggering range of sounds. Focusing that ability through your magic, you leave your disconcerted foe uncertain which way to move or unable to defend itself.

皮克精隐形 Pixie Invisibility

As a tiny creature of equal parts mischief and magic, you must remain unseen to carry out your best tricks. Creeping carefully and invisibly under the noses of friend and foe alike, you are a spy and a saboteur beyond compare.

飞翔之赐 Gift of Flight

When you fly, you leave a trail of pixie dust glittering in your wake. By tossing up a shower of that same dust, you grant your allies the freedom of flight for a time.

妖精之舞 Fairy Dance

The fey are well known for their wild, chaotic revelry. In fairy rings beneath the light of the moon, pixies lure mortals to join in their dances. However, only those you favor will be able to keep up with you. With this power, you compel every creature around you to dance to your tune.

皮克精传送术 Pixie Teleport Trick

As a child of the Feywild, you are in tune with the shortcuts between dimensions. With your pixie teleport trick, you disappear and reappear to confound an enemy's efforts to get the better of you in battle.

Human.name: 人类 Human
Human.description:
Average Height: 168cm-188cm/5'6"-6'2"

Average Weight: 61kg-100kg/135-220 lb

Ability scores: +2到一个你选择的属性

Size:

Speed:

Vision:

Languages: 通用语、另外任选一种

 

雄心勃勃的探索者，干劲十足的领导者，渴望掌控世界

奖励专长: 你在1级时获得一个奖励专长。你必须满足该专长的前提条件。 奖励技能: 你从你的职业技能列表中选择一个技能受训。 人类防御奖励: 你在强韧、反射和意志上获得+1种族加值 人类威能选择: 从下列选项中选择一个。 　　奖励随意威能: 从你的职业中获得一个额外的1级随意攻击威能。 　　勇者之力: 你具有@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.KomAcdiMDT807PXO]{勇者之力 Heroic Effort}威能。

More numerous than elves, dwarves, halflings, and eladrin, the race of humans has been the primary architect of history for centuries. While members of the other races withdraw to their isolated realms and strongholds in the face of danger, humans push forward with an ever-burning desire to overcome all challenges. Yet the same ambition and energy that pushes humans to civilize unsettled lands also makes them covet power and wealth. Even among their own kind, humans are given to conflict, infighting, and great wars.

On the borderlands, humans defend their territories against the rise of darkness even as other folk fall back to the distant mountains and dense forests. Humans strike out against the unknown, eager to leave a mark on the world. However, although humans have reached great heights, they have also become their own worst enemies time and again. A human realm faces more than just the threat of monstrous incursions. Bickering and political conflict often push human lands to the brink of civil wars more ruinous than any external foe. After all, the worst enemy is one who knows your strengths and weaknesses.

Ambition and a sometimes-reckless drive for power combine to push many humans to seek out fame and fortune through adventure and exploration. Among adventurers, humans nearly outnumber the other races combined. The rulers of the human settlements of the borderlands are often former adventurers. After acquiring enough treasure and power, they gathered followers to their banners and set to building fortresses, villages, and towns. Humans are more likely to put their faith in individuals than in institutions or tradition. As a result, a single powerful human has great potential to unite and lead others.

 

外貌特征 Physical Qualities

人类的身高、体重、与肤色多种多样。一些人类具有黑色或者深棕的皮肤，而另一些肤色苍白如雪，并且他们的肤色还包括了两种颜色之间的广泛交汇。他们的发色有黑色棕色与金色和红色。他们的眼睛通常是棕色、蓝色或者褐色。

人类的服饰彼此差异很大，取决于自然环境的要求与他们所处的社会习惯。他们的服饰可以很简单，也可能很繁琐，当然也可能是两者之间的任何形式。几个彼此完全不同的人类文明为了并肩生活而在某个地区交融在一起的例子并不少见，所以人类的武器、盔甲和其他物品上有可能有各种各样的设计与文饰。

人类的平均寿命大约为75年，虽然有一些老人可能活到90岁，或者更久。

态度和信仰 Attitudes and Beliefs

Humans are decisive and sometimes rash. They explore the darkest reaches of the world in search of knowledge and power. They hurl themselves into danger, dealing with consequences as they arise. They act first and ponder later, trusting their will to prevail and their natural resourcefulness to see them through perilous situations.

Humans always look to the horizon, seeking to expand their influence and their territory. They chase power and want to change the world, for good or for ill. Their settlements are among the brightest lights in a dark and untamed world, and humans constantly seek to explore new lands and settle new frontiers.

Their self-reliance and bravery inclines humans toward martial classes such as fighter and rogue. They often prefer to find hidden reserves of strength in themselves rather than trust to the magic of wizards or clerics.

That said, humans tend to be a pious race, worshiping the whole pantheon of gods. Their myths name no god as the creator of their race. Some tales say the gods worked together to create humans, infusing them with the best qualities of each race that had come before. Other tales say that humans were the creation of a god whose name is no longer known—a deity killed in the war against the primordials or assassinated by Asmodeus or Zehir.

Humans are tolerant of other races, different beliefs, and foreign cultures. Most human settlements consist of diverse enclaves where different races live together in relative peace. The human empire of Nerath, the last great world power, united many different peoples and ruled the land for more than five hundred years before it collapsed about a century ago. Most of the human settlements that survived the empire's fall now stand as fortified bastions against the encroaching darkness. When elven forests are razed or dwarven mines overrun, the survivors often flee to the nearest human town or city for protection.

Despite the far reach and power of Nerath, humans in the present day are a scattered and divided people. Dozens of small baronies, fiefdoms, and free citystates have arisen from Nerath's ruins, and many of these realms are petty, weak, and isolated. Tensions and misunderstandings can precipitate skirmishes, espionage, betrayal, and even open warfare between neighboring communities.

人类团体 Human Communities

Humans are the most adaptable of all folk. Their communities range from forest villages surrounded by stockades, to tent cities built around desert oases, to clusters of ice-walled huts in the farthest northern reaches, to great fortified cities standing at the center of widespread realms. Other races are known for their relationships with specific environments—the dwarves in their mountain halls, the elves with their forest realms, and the halflings following the course of river and stream. Humans, in contrast, pride themselves on being able to adapt to any environment, and to reshape that environment to their own needs. As long as water and sustenance can be found, humans can make a home in any part of the world.

Most human communities are centered around a single, powerful individual. Even folk who use elections and other egalitarian methods of government can point to one person who founded, created, and shepherded their settlement through its formative years. Of all the civilized peoples, humans are the most likely to routinely change their method of government and organization. On the borderlands, the scions of petty nobles can rule only as long as they display the same strength and purpose as their ancestors. When a leader falters, ambitious advisors and rivals are ready to lead a revolt.

Most human settlements are centered on a single dominant resource or feature, including fresh water, arable land, or an easily defended location. Humans lack the unifying cultural ties that bind most elves, dwarves, and halflings. As a result, their clans, tribes, and societies covet and hold strategically useful territory, devoting much energy to fortifying and controlling it. In a typical human settlement, there is no guarantee of distant allies riding to the rescue in times of dire need.

The Nentir Vale, a portion of the borderlands that once belonged to Nerath, features a number of human-controlled settlements, including Fallcrest, Winterhaven, and Nenlast. As in many of the frontier regions carved out from the fallen empire, these towns and villages also feature large contingents of elves, dwarves, halflings, and other races.

Although humans have developed rich cultures and styles of their own, they are also known for borrowing from others. The advanced construction techniques of the dwarves, the arcane mastery of the eladrin, and even the traditions of lost civilizations such as Bael Turath and Arkhosia can all be found in the human sphere. This leads to great variation in human architecture, clothing styles, and even religious iconography.

角色扮演人类 Roleplaying a Human

When creating a human adventurer, here are a few points to consider.

Fame, fortune, or power? Humans are driven to adventuring by any number of reasons. Most humans who dwell in the borderlands find their day-to-day life challenging enough. Your homeland is a harsh realm rife with monsters and other threats, yet something inspires you to seek out even more danger. You might adventure for wealth or glory, seeking the vast fortunes to be looted from dungeons and the power to be gained with increased experience. You might fight for your homeland, striking against the forces of darkness before those forces can lash out against your people. You might hope to combine both goals—creating a hero's name for yourself as a means of gaining the prestige and fame needed to unite the common folk under your rule.

Home is the beginning of all things. In the absence of an overriding human culture, you maintain a strong connection to the land of your birth and the home you grew up in. Most humans gather in villages, towns, and other communities, though a few prefer a more isolated existence. Your early years in such an environment shaped you, as did your reasons for leaving that home. Did you turn away from your family under a dark cloud of conflict that now puts you on the run? Or was your village attacked—and your kin slain—by invading monsters against which you swore a dark oath of vengeance?

Ideals and dreams. Many human adventurers live by a code of conduct, or they fight for some cause. You might dedicate yourself to a noble lord, to your faith, or to an organization whose values you share. Your goals might be entirely material, driving you to seek wealth or some specific relic or lore important to you. Or, your objectives might be entirely ephemeral, based on a certain philosophy or state of mind. You might fight only for yourself, seeking the wealth and power that will allow you to make a difference in the end.

人类特征: 适应性强，雄心勃勃，大胆，易受诱惑，有创造力，有动力，吃苦耐劳，务实，足智多谋，有领地意识，宽容

男性姓名: Alain, Alek, Benn, Brandis, Donn, Drew, Erik, Gregg, Jonn, Kris, Marc, Mikal, Pieter, Regdar, Quinn, Samm, Thom, Wil

女性姓名: Ana, Cassi, Eliza, Gwenn, Jenn, Kat, Keira, Luusi, Mari, Mika, Miri, Stasi, Shawna, Zanne

 

人类辅助威能 "It's time for action. Tell me about the consequences later."

Nerath was humanity's last empire. The descendants of that empire still recall the principles the nation upheld, the justice it preserved, and the virtues it championed. Like many empires, however, rapid expansion combined with human optimism made the empire vulnerable to the foes lying in wait in the dark beyond civilization's lights. It wasn't long before hordes of monsters tumbled out from the desolation to plunder and ruin all that humanity had achieved.

Defeat did little to diminish the pride humans still have in the nation they buried so long ago, and its memory inspires new heroes today. Humans are the most numerous adventurers in the lands, eager to test their mettle against myriad monsters and explore dangerous dungeons to unearth the treasures they hold. Humans bring their natural versatility to bear in the types of training they pursue and are found among every class. Some humans develop their natural talents to aid them in their adventures. Such individuals are determined and aggressive, ready to take on any challenge they might face.

You must be a human to gain and use human powers.

额外努力 Extra Effort

Humans find ways to overcome adversity and adapt to any situation. Extra effort helps you mount the will to escape a dangerous situation.

迅捷移动 Rapid Move

As a human, you seek out ways to succeed where others find only failure. Your ingenuity helps you push harder, move faster, and achieve more than the longest-lived races. This power demonstrates a way you can push yourself beyond your normal limits.

成功喜悦 Flush with Success

No matter what setbacks you face, each success drives you to press on. Flush with success rewards you for a victorious effort by giving you new vitality and the drive to move forward.

勇敢决心 Courageous Determination

The best and boldest humans learn from their errors and find ways to overcome their mistakes. If failure looms large, courageous determination gives you a chance to escape your doom and win the day.

Orc.name: 兽人 Orc
Orc.description:
Average Height: 183cm-196cm/6'0"-6'5"

Average Weight: 91kg-104kg/200-230 lb

Ability scores: +2，+2

Size:

Speed:

Vision:

Languages: 通用语，巨人语

 

急速冲刺: 当你冲锋时，你在速度上获得+2加值。 战士的顽强: 你具有@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.91Snu57emBp4jEyq]{战士的顽强 Warrior's Surge}威能

兽人信奉格乌什，独眼的杀戮之神。他们是一群野蛮，嗜血的掠夺者，是世上一切文明种族的瘟疫，而他们之间争夺食物与财富的互相残杀也同样永无止境。兽人们酷爱近战，总是一头猛地冲进最激烈的战线，而他们的小脑子里根本就没有撤退或投降的概念。

在兽人的社会结构中，不同的兽人扮演着不同的角色。 格乌什之眼乃是那些与他们残酷的神明有着特殊联系的兽人。他们负责对独眼之神的祭祀牺牲，解读他的神示，并向部落的军头们传达格乌什的旨意。 而兽人血狂乃是兽人部落中那些因为他们的强壮和狂暴而被深深畏惧着的斗士，他们也是优秀的副官和护卫。

兽人往往与食人魔一起作战，而他们也会被那些强大到足以迫使他们服从的黑暗君主或强悍怪物威逼利诱而成为他们的仆从。

 

兽人喜欢丘陵和山区环境。那些到处是洞穴的地形可以很容易地变成易守难攻的巢穴。作为嗜血的掠夺者和食人怪物，兽人尊奉格乌什，并以屠杀和毁灭敬奉它。

兽人不建造自己的定居点，而是用粗糙的防御工事改进现有的居所。他们喜欢盘踞在那些更有技术性的种族放弃的洞穴里，尽管兽人可以试着做一些粗糙的铁器和石器，但是这些懒惰贪婪的家伙还是比较喜欢用武力去掠夺其他人制造的武器，工具和货物。

兽人战帮聚集在一起组成部落，部落中最强大的个体就成为部落的专横的军头。同一个部落里的某些战帮可能漫游到远离家乡的地方，但是他们依然会把同一个部落的兽人看作同族。

兽人通常用挖出自己的一只眼睛作为祭品的方式作为对格乌什，独眼之神的信仰的证明。

神话传说中，科瑞隆一箭射瞎了格乌什的一只眼睛，因此兽人们对精灵和雅灵有着特殊的憎恨。

Hamadryad.name: 树精 Hamadryad
Hamadryad.description:
Average Height: 168cm-188cm/5'6"-6'2"

Average Weight: 59kg-82kg/130-180 lb

Ability scores: +2；+2

Size:

Speed:

Vision:

Languages: 通用语，精灵语

Skill Bonuses: +2交涉，+2自然

 

迷人的施法者，绝代佳人，妖精的荒野女王。

仅为女性: 所有的树精都是女性 精界起源: 你的祖先是妖精荒野的原住民，因此在有关生物起源的效果上，你被视为妖精界生物。 森林行者: 你无视由树、灌木丛或其他的森林植株所构成的困难地形。 橡木活力: 你的树木传统为你对抗饥饿、口渴或窒息效果的坚韧检定提供+5种族加值，且在你需要做这些检定之前，你可以存活2倍通常的时间周期。你不需要睡眠，但是你每天必须冥想至少4个小时来吸收光能（即使只是来自一根小蜡烛）、泡在水里或与你脚下的大地交流。这种冥想提供给你跟其他种族从长休息获取的一样的增益。在冥想期间，你可以像平常一样充分地感知你周遭的环境并警觉接近的敌人以及其他事物。 木族意志: 你在对抗晕眩，被支配或震慑的豁免检定上获得+2种族加值。 树精形态: 你具有@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.msLa6lUNAFezZh54]{树精形态 Hamadryad Aspects}威能。

树精是活橡木的重生之魂。她们半肉，半木，带一点精类的灵魂，是自然四季的孙女，也是荒野之美的超然展现。

在盘古初开之时，世界有着比任何生物都美丽，都狂野的四名女儿。他们名叫夏、秋、冬、春。在魔神和诸神的远观下，他们在世界互相追逐嬉戏。他们又跟风中的兄弟相好，并誔下首代的自然仙女。他们分别是夏梣，秋橡，冬杉，春花，是世界上的第一批树木的精灵。

在已被遗忘的长久岁月里，这些飘忽无常的仙女在初生世界的森林中戏玩着。但好景不常。随着凡人的兴盛，那些树精姐妹中最睿智最深思熟虑的秋之橡木开始察觉到自然的衰退，从而停止玩乐。木林被焚燬，树精的园林被砍伐，世上大片的区域因凡人的战乱和贪婪变成不毛之地。

为了保卫家园，这些秋天的仙女彻底拥抱她们的狂野天性。她们舍弃无忧无虑的不朽精魂，花费漫长的时间化身成被称为树精的森林之女儿。在这型态下，她们用强力的枝子和支节保护森林，用智慧去了解凡间生物的思想和动机。

树精介于贪玩的仙女和凶猛的树精之间。身绑于树，树精会热炽地保护她所属的树林。她呼召林木的力量去击打仇敌，召唤精族血统所赋予的迷人美貌去俘虏和迷惑凡人改变他们的破坏行为。树精保留了秋之自然精灵的无瑕躺体和典雅气息。可是，她们也可以在一瞬间将肉体强化到跟最古老的树一样硬，同样地她们的心也变得像木一样坚硬，容不下同情之心。

一名年轻的树精通常会被绑定于一棵拟似她的女性型态的树家。在年轻的时候她会留在自己的树所属的森林，也就是她的生命的依据。但是，有些树精会罕有地因命运或命数的转折而跟自己的树家断绝关系。

有些树精可能是为了避免跟树家一起遭受自然灾害或恐怖外力的毒手。有些是为了拯救森林而必需远行。有些跟文明交往，染上了凡族的因怨情愁。因应内心的呼唤，她们从泥土拔根，舍弃所熟识的一切，迎向凡世的感情与起伏。

 

外貌特征 Physical Qualities

生于自然之手，所有树精都是女性，以两种方式展现自己。在自然精灵的型态下，这些四季与四风的孙女是使人愉悦的精族完美典范。她们的头发可能吊着秋叶和松果，发色衬映秋叶，有绿、褐、金、橙、红、棕。而眼是清澈的绿、白、金。

树木型态的树精也相去不远。不过当一名树精唤出树木的力量时，她的外表也会变得像出自精工之手的木材，木纹像池溏上的涟漪一样自她身上扩散开来。

当处于自己的森林时，树精会以一丝不挂的树木型态融入树皮和灌木之中。当要现身于凡人和文明的时候，她们偏好穿着随风起舞的轻纱。

想以肉体能力导正世界的冒险者树精会喜欢天然材质所制的护甲，例如皮甲或厚皮甲。如果需要更厚重的保护，她们偏好出自雅灵和精灵之手的轻巧秘银甲。当树精穿护甲时，她们会用刻下或綉下表逹森林之家与及战斗理念的图案。离开森林的树精英雄会随身带着所属森林的一部分，可以是从掉技雕出的小饰物，也可能是永不退色的秋叶花冠。

作为秋之橡木的精灵，大部分树精跟她们身系的树一样长寿。短寿的一二百年，长寿的已经跨过世纪。当树精的树家活不下去时，树精会经历深切的悲痛和哀伤。

态度和信仰 Attitudes and Beliefs

当首批秋之自然精灵变化成为树精时，她们也舍弃了洁净的永恒生命。同样地，所有树精在追逐凡世命途或心愿的时候也会经历一些根本的转变。就好像树木在秋天落叶一样，树精也丢下跟姐妹淘的戏玩追逐细语，让冬天沉积在心内。她们再也不是善变的精类，而是受凡人心中的目标和目的所带领。

即使在改变后，树精依然维持自然精灵们热情和冲动的天性。她们惯于让凡人顺从自己，有时会难以了解为甚么得不到所请求的东西。涉世未深的树精有时会缺乏耐性﹐无法理解和摸仿凡族的文化和禁忌。当她们的天然魅力没有果效时，愤怒的树精可能会展露树木的型态，释放出自然的凶暴力量。

很多勇闯世界的树精都曾被夺去家园，为寻求家园被毁的公义或复仇而入世。有些则是向往自己所缺乏的一些凡人生命的元素，为此痴迷。那驱策凡人去接下史诗任务和为原则奉献一切的精神吸引了为数不少的树精，让她们以探求为名抛下无忧的生活。

有时凡世的爱会驱使树精离开和平安稳的家园。虽然这种感情在树精中很罕见，但那些感受到爱情之痛或思考太多不能自拔的树精都无可避免地会尝试去填补它所创造的寂寞空洞。

树精团体 Hamadryad Communities

树精是一种孤独的存在。幼年时，她们在凡世和精界的林木间玩耍，无忧地跟同类戏玩。进入世界的决定意味着树精将跟她的姐妹失去联系。

当一名树精冒险者离开她的树进入凡世时，她只能一个人走。漂亮的她们会被其他类人吸引 - 无论是被她的美貌俘虏还是想利用她的无知。

树精很快就会懂得聚集到其他精类群聚的地方，那儿的侏儒、皮克精、雅灵、精灵和半羊人比较欢迎她。ㅡ些精族群体甚至会视她们为高贵的宾客或皇族——有时会令一些树精认为应该一直受到这种款待。这种期望加上树精本身就难以适应其他文化，可能令周围的人觉得她自大傲慢。

游历万千世界的树精到最后总会想回到自己的林家，找一处能跟自己的苦楚或心愿产生共呜的地方。她会独自留在这地点，深深植根入土，渐渐的长高长壮，变成一棵保留着精灵型态的树。其他的精类会为此地吸引，尤以仙子和地侏特别容易在附近定居。

角色扮演树精 Roleplaying a Hamadryad

当你创造一名树精冒险者时，你需要记着几点。

你习惯让一切在掌控之内。跟其他自然仙子一样，你擅于用美貌与大能去使凡人顺服于你。可是，作为树精，你已经压倦了儿戏的游戏，现在驱动约定俗成的是保护和改变世界的欲望。虽然其他人可能会轻视或甚至忽略你的愿景，但你依然惯于被顺从。因此，那些无视你的睿智和提醒的人会使你怒火中烧。你是精类，既狂野又深藏，是穹苍与四季的孙女，你关心的事远要重于凡人的无聊兴致。

世界对你而言是陌生的。你从没想过森林以外的世界是如此广阔。凡人在目之所及的一切地方以土木建构堪比雅灵文明的伟大建筑。异族之道是奇怪而退步的。因此，你所学的第一件事，就是你还有很多要学。虽然你的精类天性使你很冲动－也有人说是虚荣－你知道如果想达成目标的话自己就要作出取舍。如果你想成功，你需要适应当地的奇怪习俗和住民，寻求他们的帮助以达成目标。

经验、智慧、爱情、意义。世事对你而言很奇妙。各异族都被驱策于短暂的目标，也会喜悦于一些很简单的事物，这些都令你感到好奇。每一度新感觉都丰富了你对体验和知识的追求。可是，凡世最大的奥妙是爱。你可以理解慈悲，因为你对你的朋友和树林也是如此。你可以理解渴望和诱惑，因为这些是自然之道也是你的工具。但真爱，是另一个世界的东西，即使你能从他对凡人的影响推断出这是值得探究的东西。也许有一天你也能亲身体会它的神奇力量。

树精特征: 反覆无常，好奇心重，迷人，优雅，气势恢宏，安详，冲动，虚荣

树精姓名: Aileia, Celindara, Eilonwy, Irinea, Lyrindel, Rhiana

 

树精辅助威能

当你的树精角色在1级之后获得一个职业辅助威能时，你能选择一个相同或更低等级的树精辅助威能来取代该职业辅助威能。

坚实树体 Body of Solid Oak

As the spirit of a living tree, you can transform your flesh into wood and bark, shrugging off blows that might otherwise lay you low. Axe, arrow, and claw pose less danger to you when you employ this power. However, fire becomes a more significant threat.

木质庇护所 Wooden Sanctuary

You are equal parts flesh and fey tree spirit, and as such, you walk the line between the waking world and that of the forest that created you. Your unique nature allows you to enter any tree or wooden object to draw strength from its essence, then slip back into the fight where your foes least expect you to appear.

灵魂形态 Spirit Form

The connection you once forged with your tree home allowed your body to naturally shift into a semisolid state as you merged with its living form. With effort, you have trained yourself to consciously trigger this instinctive impulse, taking the form of a drifting ethereal creature for a time.

妖精之王 Feyborn Majesty

Those that would harm a powerful creature of the Feywild soon come to regret their rash action. When your body suffers a grievous hurt, the fey spirit within you flares with brilliance that unnerves your enemies.

妖精心镜 Fey Mind Mirror

Creatures of the Feywild are known for their resistance to the control of others. You have focused this innate resistance, allowing you to ignore the most debilitating coercion of mind and body even as you laughingly turn your foe’s attack back on its creator.

Thri-Kreen.name: 螳螂人 Thri-Kreen
Thri-Kreen.description:
Average Height: 163cm-198cm/5'4"–6'6"

Average Weight: 82kg-109kg/180-240 lb

Ability scores: +2；+2

Size:

Speed:

Vision:

Languages: 通用语，螳螂人语

Skill Bonuses: +2运动，+2自然

 

被大部分的阿塔斯人视为异形，这些居住在沙漠中的生物毕生追求狩猎的快感。

多条手臂: 每回合一次，你能以一个自由动作拔出或收起一件武器（或是取出或收回你自己身上的一件物品），而不是次要动作。 天然跳跃者: 螳螂人在跳跃时总是视为已有助跑。 蛰伏: 螳螂人会进入一种称为蛰伏的状态，而不是睡觉。在此状态下，你仍然可以清楚地感觉到周围发生的事情，且你只需要蛰伏4个小时（而非睡眠6个小时）即可得到一次长休息的好处。 螳螂锐爪: 你具有螳螂锐爪 Thri-kreen Claws威能。

顾名思义，螳螂人是一种与螳螂颇为相似的类人生物，成群结队地游荡在阿塔斯的荒漠中寻找猎物。他们早已适应了阿塔斯严酷的气候，并且可以只依靠极少的一点资源过活。螳螂人是灵敏的战士，而且其中还有许多的灵能者。

扮演一名螳螂人，如果你希望…

* 成为一个务实的猎人，一个在荒芜世界中求生的高手。 * 扮演一个在各个方面都与人类大不相同的种族。 * 成为偏好武僧、德鲁伊和游侠的种族中的一员

 

外貌特征 Physical Qualities

螳螂人的身体表面则被坚硬的，土黄色的甲壳覆盖着。螳螂人有六肢，最靠下的一对是腿，最靠上的一对是手臂。中间那一对肢体细小但灵活，因此螳螂人经常使用它来进行一些精密的动作，而重活则交给靠上的手臂来做。中间和上面的肢体末端都有3个作为爪的手指和一个可以倒转180度的拇指。在战斗中，螳螂人会使用最靠上的那对手臂来持用武器和盾牌，因为中间的那对肢体缺乏持武战斗的力量，同时使用两对手臂进行战斗反而会适得其反。

灵活而强壮的螳螂人是天生的攀爬者和跳跃者。他们楔形的头部上长着较大的复眼，两条（已经退化的）触角，以及强壮的下颚。他们会说一种带口音的通用语，不过通常来说他们更喜欢说他们自己的语言，因为对他们的嘴部来说后者更加容易发音。

螳螂人的生命周期非常之短，鲜少有活过30岁的个体。

角色扮演螳螂人 Roleplaying a Thri-Kreen

其他种族往往认为螳螂人的感情、举止和生理是奇异而难以理解的，但抛开他们凶猛的外表不谈，这些昆虫般的类人生物确实可以成为忠心且勇敢的伙伴。与其他种族一样，螳螂人也有自己的道德准则，只不过他们的准则与人类不尽相同而已。最重要的一点是，当判定其他生物的价值时，螳螂人最注重的是对方的身体与精神的素质。懒惰和软弱者将遭到轻蔑，不管对方是哪个种族都是如此；相应的，强壮及睿智者将得到尊敬，不管表现出这些优点的生物来自哪个种族。

螳螂人非常注重狩猎以及“猎手与猎物”的关系。螳螂人最基础的社会单位是巢群(clutch)和集群(pack)。巢群是一个规模很小（不超过6个个体）组成的小组，小组内的所有成员之间都有着紧密的联系。对螳螂人而言，“巢群”一词同时包含了“团队”“朋友”以及“家庭”的意思。任何一个螳螂人都有一个最初的巢群(birth clutch)，这个巢群中包含了所有在同一批卵中孵化出来的螳螂人；然后，在长大之后，大部分螳螂人都会再组成或者加入一个或更多的巢群，这种巢群可能是一个冒险小组，也有可能是一个狩猎团队。集群是一个更大的社会单位，可以由任意数量的巢群组成。如果某只螳螂人现在不属于任何一个巢群，那么他的生物本能将会不断催促他去寻找并加入一个新的小组。

在群居本能的驱使之下，螳螂人会尝试在任何组织内找到属于他们自己的位置。他们会使用一系列的挑战来决定各自在巢群中的地位，或者是暗中评定未来的同胞(clutchmate)的能力。并且，在有必要的时候，螳螂人们会要求以战斗的方式来测试一个个体的能力。如果一个螳螂人是他所在的巢群中最强的个体，那么他将会担起领导巢群的重任；但如果他不是的话，螳螂人也并不会介意作为领导者的部下和强有力的盟友存在。他们绝对不会违抗领导者的指令，并且总是迫切地希望完成应该由他来做的使命。螳螂人的组织也许看似独裁，但事实是组织中的任何成员都有权利发表意见以及向同胞提出建议。实际上，在其他人无法完成某一领域的事情时，任何懂行的螳螂人都会被要求用他的专业知识来帮助巢群。所有人都必须为巢群的强盛和狩猎的成功做出贡献。

在螳螂人看来，战斗仅仅是另一种形式的狩猎而已。螳螂人很少会出于恶意而挑起争端；他们不认为有必要进攻其他生物，除非这是眼下最好的获取资源的手段。当然，自我防卫就是另外一回事了——一个遭到攻击的螳螂人唯一可能的反应就是一阵极为猛烈的还击。在战斗胜利之后，螳螂人会做的第一件事情就是取走敌人身上带着的任何能用到的物品，以及（对于野兽）收集敌人的尸体作为食物储备。

许多螳螂人都拥有心灵异能。有些螳螂人选择在这一条道路上发展下去，成为武僧或者战魂；其他螳螂人则把这种能力归为种族记忆。螳螂人在刚刚出生时便能理解螳螂人的语言以及“巢群”一词的含义。当一个螳螂人遇见一个曾经在螳螂人历史中扮演过重要角色的地点或物品时，他也许会在一瞬间看见这事物的过去——远古时代的种族记忆，在此之前它一直被潜意识压抑着，但它确实存在……并且正闪现在你的脑海中。

螳螂人特征: 奇异，忠诚，古怪，顺从，食肉，单纯，强硬

男性与女性姓名: Cha'ka, Chuka-tet, Drik-chkit, Hakka, Ka'cha, Kacht-ta, Ka'tho, Lakta-cho, Pak'cha, Pik-ik-cha, Sa'Relka, T'Chai, Tak-tha

 

螳螂人辅助威能

当你的螳螂人角色获得一个职业辅助威能时，你能选择一个相同或更低等级的螳螂人辅助威能来取代该职业辅助威能。

Tiefling.name: 提夫林 Tiefling
Tiefling.description:
Average Height: 168cm-188cm/5'6"-6'2"

Average Weight: 64kg-104kg/140-230 lb

Ability scores: +2；+2

Size:

Speed:

Vision:

Languages: 通用语，另外任选一种

Skill Bonuses: +2唬骗，+2隐秘

 

一个被毁灭帝国的继承者，生存在阴影中，从不惧怕黑暗。

逐血: 你在对重伤敌人的攻击骰上获得+1种族加值。 火焰抗力: 你拥有等同于5 + 一半你的等级的火焰抗力。 地狱之怒: 你具有@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.Xa7LQDjcYt2H9h4o]{地狱之怒 Infernal Wrath}威能。

Heirs to an ancient, infernal bloodline, tieflings have no realms of their own but instead live within human kingdoms and cities. They are descended from human nobles who bargained with dark powers, and whose empire once subjugated half the world. But the empire was cast down into ruin, and tieflings were left to make their own way in a world that often fears and resents them.

Hundreds of years ago, the leaders of the human empire of Bael Turath made pacts with devils to solidify their hold over its enormous territory. Those humans became the first tieflings, and they governed their empire in the name of their infernal masters. In time, Bael Turath came into conflict with Arkhosia, the ancient empire of the dragonborn, and decades of warfare left both empires in ruins. Bael Turath's grand capital was thrown down in ruin.

Following the collapse of their empire, the tieflings were scattered. Bearing the infernal visage that was the mark of their pact with the forces of darkness, they found a cold and sometimes deadly welcome in the humanoid societies to which they fled.

Once a powerful people with a strong nobility, the tieflings were reduced to little more than vagabonds. Their population dwindled, and for many decades, the survivors of Bael Turath were in danger of being wiped out and forgotten.

Over time, however, the last of the great Turathi nobles began to reclaim their place in the world. Cautiously earning the trust of other peoples, the descendants of those nobles began to spread into human communities that were willing to allow them to live in peace, and the tiefling race was reborn. In the present age, tieflings are less common than many other races, but their numbers grow stronger with each generation.

 

外貌特征 Physical Qualities

提夫林的外表证明了他们来自地狱的血脉。他们有着巨大的角；粗大，无法卷曲的长达4到5英尺的尾巴；尖利的牙齿；如同黑色，红色，白色，银色或者金色的球体的眼珠。他们的肤色包涵了所有人类的肤色，并且包括从浅红到砖红等各种红色。它们的头发从角后垂下来，很可能是深蓝色、红色或紫色，就像人类常见的颜色一样。

提夫林偏爱暗色和红色，皮衣和光洁的毛皮，小尖刺和扣环。提夫林打造的武器和护甲往往有带有古代风格，追溯他们早已消失帝国的荣光。

提夫林和人类有着同样的寿命和普遍的老化模式

态度和信仰 Attitudes and Beliefs

After long generations of living on the fringes of other cultures, tieflings believe strongly that all people must fend for themselves. Tieflings practice self-sufficiency with an almost religious devotion, adhering to this virtue throughout their lives. This attitude can make tieflings seem distrustful—a reputation that is deserved to some degree. Tieflings who believe that they can rely only on themselves are naturally skeptical of others that offer help. A tiefling reduced to destitution by fate will beg, borrow, steal, cajole, or do whatever else is necessary in order to eat. If that same character later becomes flush with wealth, he hoards and guards that wealth, not trusting anyone else to even hold it.

Tieflings live for today and tomorrow, only rarely dwelling on the past. This attitude; which originated in the fall of Bael Turath, enables the tieflings to overcome the darkness of their history in favor of a future when their kind will rise to prominence once more. It is easy to assume that tieflings cannot feel guilt or sadness, but the truth is that they simply do not dwell on such things. Retribution rather than mourning is the tiefling way.

Tieflings firmly believe that they cannot allow others to run roughshod over them. The scorn, derision, and violence shown to the tieflings since the fall of Bael Turath have hardened their race, such that few tieflings will willingly back down from a confrontation. To do so invites the dismissive treatment once imposed on their forebears—and a contempt that lessens the worth of the race as a whole.

提夫林团体 Tiefling Communities

Since the fall of Bael Turath, scattered tiefling communities have formed and fallen apart countless times. In some cases, old rivalries born of the Turathi noble houses inspire infighting that brings about social unrest and collapse. Other times, the reputation of their race makes the tieflings unwelcome neighbors, driven off by suspicious humans or targeted by dragonborn mercenaries seeking to rekindle ancient rivalries.

Tiefling communities that survive for any length of time are most often found as small populations within some other society. Tieflings often have to purchase their acceptance within larger communities, and they can usually afford to do so only if they are engaged in some kind of profitable venture. As a result, a tiefling community is typically built around a vocation, from a merchant cartel operating within a cluster of human towns, to bands of tiefling mercenaries establishing themselves within the frontier outposts and citadels of other races. In larger cities, tiefling crime syndicates are common.

Across the borderlands, a small number of tiefling settlements persist in the ruins of Bael Turath. Though these villages stand in the rubble of the greatest tiefling cities, their residents typically have less knowledge of their ancestors and history than the tieflings who long ago scattered into human lands. Some tieflings avoid these communities for their proximity to the past, fearing that such cursed locations will bring ruin to all who dwell there.

角色扮演提夫林 Roleplaying a Tiefling

When creating a tiefling character, here are a few points to consider.

The shadow of Bael Turath hangs over you. Your race is forever marked by your ancestors' dealings with infernal forces, and you carry the dark legend of Bael Turath with you wherever you go. Others treat you with fear and scorn— even those who do not directly blame you for the evil of your forebears. As you make your way in the world, your path will largely be defined by how you react when a stranger cowers in fear at the sight of you—or what you do when people in need refuse your aid because of your dark heritage.
